title: Pentacalia campii
intro: Pentacalia campii, also known as Campii's pentacalia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to help alleviate various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The bioactive constituents of Pentacalia campii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Pentacalia campii is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is commonly used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules.
